steps.title: Read the y-intercept and calculate the slope
steps.content:
From the table, when $x = 0$, we have $y = 95$, so the y-intercept is $b = 95$.
From any two consecutive points, we can find the slope: from $(0, 95)$ to $(1, 105)$,
$$m = \frac{105 - 95}{1 - 0} = \frac{10}{1} = 10$$

steps.title: Form the linear equation and match the choice
steps.content:
With slope $m = 10$ and y-intercept $b = 95$, the equation is
$$y = 10x + 95$$
That matches choice A — A is correct.
